_meta.source: ARM Generic Interrupt Controller Architecture Specification, GIC architecture version 3 and version 4 (IHI0069H)
_meta.note: Hand-curated from IHI0069H and cross-referenced with ARM System Register XML (SysReg_xml_A_profile-2023-03). Field descriptions derived from publicly available ARM Architecture documentation.

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_IAR0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Acknowledge Register 0 (Group 0)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_IAR1_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Acknowledge Register 1 (Group 1)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_EOIR0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller End Of Interrupt Register 0 (Group 0)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_EOIR1_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller End Of Interrupt Register 1 (Group 1)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_HPPIR0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Highest Priority Pending Interrupt Register 0

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_HPPIR1_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Highest Priority Pending Interrupt Register 1

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_BPR0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Binary Point Register 0 (Group 0)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_BPR1_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Binary Point Register 1 (Group 1)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_PMR_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Priority Mask Register

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_RPR_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Running Priority Register

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_CTLR_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Control Register (EL1)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_CTLR_EL3
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Control Register (EL3)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_SRE_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller System Register Enable Register (EL1)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_SRE_EL2
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller System Register Enable Register (EL2)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_SRE_EL3
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller System Register Enable Register (EL3)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_IGRPEN0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Group 0 Enable Register

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_IGRPEN1_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Group 1 Enable Register

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_IGRPEN1_EL3
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Interrupt Group 1 Enable Register (EL3)

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_SEIEN_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller System Error Interrupt Enable Register

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_AP0R0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Active Priorities Register 0, Group 0

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_AP1R0_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Active Priorities Register 0, Group 1

icc_system_registers.name: ICC_DIR_EL1
icc_system_registers.brief: Interrupt Controller Deactivate Interrupt Register

registers.name: GICD_CTLR
registers.title: Distributor Control Register
registers.brief: Controls the distribution of interrupts to processor interfaces. The format depends on the Security state of the access and whether the system supports two Security states.

fields.name: RWP
fields.brief: Register Write Pending. Indicates whether a write to GICD_CTLR or GICD_ICENABLER<n> is outstanding.

fields.name: RES0_30_8
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: E1NWF
fields.brief: Enable 1 of N Wakeup Functionality. Enables the 1 of N wakeup functionality.

fields.name: DS
fields.brief: Disable Security. Controls whether a single or two Security states are supported.

fields.name: ARE_NS
fields.brief: Affinity Routing Enable, Non-secure state. Enables affinity routing for the Non-secure state.

fields.name: ARE_S
fields.brief: Affinity Routing Enable, Secure state. Enables affinity routing for the Secure state.

fields.name: RES0_3
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: EnableGrp1S
fields.brief: Enable Secure Group 1 interrupts. Enables the forwarding of pending Secure Group 1 interrupts from the Distributor to the CPU interfaces.

fields.name: EnableGrp1NS
fields.brief: Enable Non-secure Group 1 interrupts. Enables the forwarding of pending Non-secure Group 1 interrupts from the Distributor to the CPU interfaces.

fields.name: EnableGrp0
fields.brief: Enable Group 0 interrupts. Enables the forwarding of pending Group 0 interrupts from the Distributor to the CPU interfaces.

fields.name: RWP
fields.brief: Register Write Pending. Indicates whether a write to GICD_CTLR or GICD_ICENABLER<n> is outstanding.

fields.name: RES0_30_5
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: ARE_NS
fields.brief: Affinity Routing Enable, Non-secure state. Enables affinity routing for the Non-secure state.

fields.name: RES0_3_2
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: EnableGrp1A
fields.brief: Alias of GICD_CTLR.EnableGrp1NS. This bit is an alias of the EnableGrp1NS bit.

fields.name: EnableGrp1
fields.brief: Enable Non-secure Group 1 interrupts (when ARE_NS==0).

fields.name: RWP
fields.brief: Register Write Pending. Indicates whether a write to GICD_CTLR or GICD_ICENABLER<n> is outstanding.

fields.name: RES0_30_9
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: nASSGIreq
fields.brief: Non-Affinity Scheduled SGI. When FEAT_GICv4p1 is implemented: controls which SGIs can be forwarded to the IRQ or FIQ bypass outputs.

fields.name: E1NWF
fields.brief: Enable 1 of N Wakeup Functionality.

fields.name: DS
fields.brief: Disable Security. Always reads as 1 and can only be cleared by a hardware reset.

fields.name: RES0_5
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: ARE
fields.brief: Affinity Routing Enable. Enables affinity routing.

fields.name: RES0_3_2
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: EnableGrp1
fields.brief: Enable Group 1 interrupts. Enables the forwarding of pending Group 1 interrupts from the Distributor.

fields.name: EnableGrp0
fields.brief: Enable Group 0 interrupts. Enables the forwarding of pending Group 0 interrupts from the Distributor.

registers.name: GICD_TYPER
registers.title: Interrupt Controller Type Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the number of interrupts implemented and other GIC features.

fields.name: ESPI_range
fields.brief: Extended SPI range. Indicates the maximum INTID of the Extended SPI range as (ESPI_range * 32) + 31.

fields.name: RSS
fields.brief: Indicates whether the implementation supports range selector support (RSS).

fields.name: No1N
fields.brief: Indicates whether the implementation does not support 1 of N SPI targeting.

fields.name: A3V
fields.brief: Affinity 3 Valid. Indicates whether the GIC implementation supports non-zero values of Affinity level 3.

fields.name: IDbits
fields.brief: The number of interrupt identifier bits supported, minus one.

fields.name: DVIS
fields.brief: Direct Virtual LPI injection supported (GICv4).

fields.name: LPIS
fields.brief: LPI support. Indicates whether the implementation supports LPIs.

fields.name: MBIS
fields.brief: Message Based Interrupt Support. Indicates whether the implementation supports message-based interrupts by writing to Distributor or Redistributor registers.

fields.name: num_LPIs
fields.brief: The number of supported LPIs (if nonzero: 2^(num_LPIs+1) LPIs).

fields.name: SecurityExtn
fields.brief: Security Extension. Indicates whether the GIC implementation supports two Security states.

fields.name: NMI
fields.brief: Non-maskable Interrupt support. Indicates whether the implementation supports NMI.

fields.name: ESPI
fields.brief: Extended SPI. Indicates whether the implementation supports Extended SPI range.

fields.name: ITLinesNumber
fields.brief: Indicates the maximum number of SPIs supported. If ITLinesNumber=N, the maximum number of SPIs supported is 32N.

registers.name: GICD_IIDR
registers.title: Distributor Implementer Identification Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the implementer and revision of the Distributor component.

fields.name: ProductID
fields.brief: Product identifier.

fields.name: RES0_23_20
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Variant
fields.brief: Implementation defined variant.

fields.name: Revision
fields.brief: Revision of the implementation.

fields.name: Implementer
fields.brief: JEP106 implementer code. Bits[11:8] are the JEP106 continuation code; bits[7:0] are the JEP106 identity code.

registers.name: GICD_STATUSR
registers.title: Error Reporting Status Register
registers.brief: Records error conditions detected by the Distributor. This register is optional.

fields.name: RES0_31_4
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: WROD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a write to a read-only location is detected.

fields.name: RWOD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a read of a write-only location is detected.

fields.name: WRD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a write to a reserved location is detected.

fields.name: RRD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a read of a reserved location is detected.

registers.name: GICD_IGROUPR<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Group Registers
registers.brief: Provides a Group status bit for each interrupt supported by the GIC. Each bit controls the group of the corresponding interrupt.

fields.name: Group_status
fields.brief: Group status bits. Bit x controls interrupt ID (32n + x): 0 = Group 0, 1 = Group 1.

registers.name: GICD_ISENABLER<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Set-Enable Registers
registers.brief: Enable bits for each interrupt. Writing 1 to a bit enables the corresponding interrupt; writing 0 has no effect.

fields.name: Set_enable
fields.brief: Set-enable bits. Writing 1 enables forwarding of the corresponding interrupt; writing 0 has no effect. Reads return the current enable state.

registers.name: GICD_ICENABLER<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Clear-Enable Registers
registers.brief: Disable bits for each interrupt. Writing 1 to a bit disables the corresponding interrupt; writing 0 has no effect.

fields.name: Clear_enable
fields.brief: Clear-enable bits. Writing 1 disables forwarding of the corresponding interrupt; writing 0 has no effect. Reads return the current enable state.

registers.name: GICD_IPRIORITYR<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Priority Registers
registers.brief: Provides an 8-bit priority field for each interrupt supported by the GIC. These registers are byte-accessible.

fields.name: Priority_byte3
fields.brief: Priority for interrupt ID (4n+3).

fields.name: Priority_byte2
fields.brief: Priority for interrupt ID (4n+2).

fields.name: Priority_byte1
fields.brief: Priority for interrupt ID (4n+1).

fields.name: Priority_byte0
fields.brief: Priority for interrupt ID (4n+0).

registers.name: GICD_ICFGR<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Configuration Registers
registers.brief: Provides 2-bit Int_config fields for each interrupt supported by the GIC. These fields indicate whether the corresponding interrupt is edge-triggered or level-sensitive.

fields.name: Int_config
fields.brief: 2-bit configuration fields. Bits[2x+1:2x] configure interrupt 16n+x: bit[2x+1]=0 level-sensitive, bit[2x+1]=1 edge-triggered. Bit[2x] is RES0 for SPIs.

registers.name: GICD_IGRPMODR<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Group Modifier Registers
registers.brief: Provides the Group Modifier bit for each interrupt. Combined with GICD_IGROUPR<n>, this determines the security group of the interrupt.

fields.name: Grp_modifier
fields.brief: Group Modifier bits. Combined with IGROUPR: IGROUPR=0/IGRPMODR=0 = Secure Group 0; IGROUPR=0/IGRPMODR=1 = Secure Group 1; IGROUPR=1/IGRPMODR=0 = Non-secure Group 1.

registers.name: GICD_IROUTER<n>
registers.title: Interrupt Routing Registers
registers.brief: Provides the routing information for each SPI interrupt. Valid when affinity routing is enabled (ARE_S=1 or ARE_NS=1).

fields.name: IRM
fields.brief: Interrupt Routing Mode. 0 = route to specific PE (Aff3.Aff2.Aff1.Aff0); 1 = route to any PE defined as a participating node.

fields.name: Aff3
fields.brief: Affinity level 3. Affinity 3 target for the SPI.

fields.name: RES0_23_16
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Aff2
fields.brief: Affinity level 2.

fields.name: Aff1
fields.brief: Affinity level 1.

fields.name: Aff0
fields.brief: Affinity level 0.

registers.name: GICR_CTLR
registers.title: Redistributor Control Register
registers.brief: Controls the operation of the Redistributor. This is a per-PE register located in the RD_base frame.

fields.name: UWP
fields.brief: Upstream Write Pending. Reads as 1 when there are upstream writes pending and 0 when there are no upstream writes pending.

fields.name: RES0_30_26
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: DPG1S
fields.brief: Disable Processor selection for Group 1 Secure interrupts. Prevents Redistributor from including this PE when selecting target PEs for Group 1 Secure interrupts.

fields.name: DPG1NS
fields.brief: Disable Processor selection for Group 1 Non-secure interrupts. Prevents Redistributor from including this PE for Non-secure Group 1 selection.

fields.name: DPG0
fields.brief: Disable Processor selection for Group 0 interrupts. Prevents Redistributor from including this PE for Group 0 selection.

fields.name: RES0_22_4
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: RWP
fields.brief: Register Write Pending. Reads as 1 when GICR_CTLR write is outstanding.

fields.name: RES0_2
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: IR
fields.brief: Enable LPIs. When this bit is set to 1, this Redistributor will activate the LPI interrupt. This bit might be RAO/WI.

fields.name: EnableLPIs
fields.brief: Enable LPIs. Enables the Redistributor to cache and manage LPI pending state. Once set to 1, may only be cleared by reset.

registers.name: GICR_IIDR
registers.title: Redistributor Implementer Identification Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the implementer and revision of the Redistributor component.

fields.name: ProductID
fields.brief: Product identifier.

fields.name: RES0_23_20
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Variant
fields.brief: Implementation defined variant.

fields.name: Revision
fields.brief: Revision of the implementation.

fields.name: Implementer
fields.brief: JEP106 implementer code.

registers.name: GICR_TYPER
registers.title: Redistributor Type Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the configuration of the Redistributor.

fields.name: Affinity_Value
fields.brief: The identity of the PE associated with this Redistributor. GICR_TYPER.Affinity_Value[7:0]=Aff0, [15:8]=Aff1, [23:16]=Aff2, [31:24]=Aff3.

fields.name: CommonLPIAff
fields.brief: Indicates the affinity level at which LPI pending state is shared between Redistributors.

fields.name: Processor_Number
fields.brief: A unique identifier for the PE.

fields.name: RVPEID
fields.brief: Set to 1 if this Redistributor supports receipt of direct LPIs.

fields.name: MPAM
fields.brief: MPAM support. Set to 1 if MPAM extensions are implemented.

fields.name: DPGS
fields.brief: Set to 1 if GICR_CTLR.DPG* bits are implemented.

fields.name: Last
fields.brief: Indicates whether this Redistributor is the last in the series of Redistributors for this affinity level.

fields.name: DirectLPI
fields.brief: Set to 1 if the Redistributor supports direct injection of LPIs.

fields.name: Dirty
fields.brief: Dirty. Set to 1 during LPI pending table initialization.

fields.name: VLPIS
fields.brief: Virtual LPIs supported (GICv4). Set to 1 if the Redistributor supports virtual LPIs.

fields.name: PLPIS
fields.brief: Physical LPIs supported. Set to 1 if the Redistributor supports physical LPIs.

registers.name: GICR_STATUSR
registers.title: Redistributor Error Reporting Status Register
registers.brief: Records error conditions detected by the Redistributor. This register is optional.

fields.name: RES0_31_4
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: WROD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a write to a read-only location is detected.

fields.name: RWOD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a read of a write-only location is detected.

fields.name: WRD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a write to a reserved location is detected.

fields.name: RRD
fields.brief: Set to 1 when a read of a reserved location is detected.

registers.name: GICR_WAKER
registers.title: Redistributor Wake Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the state of the connected PE and allows software to request that the PE is put into a state where it can receive interrupts.

fields.name: RES0_31_3
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: ChildrenAsleep
fields.brief: Indicates that all connected interrupt groups are quiescent (sleeping).

fields.name: ProcessorSleep
fields.brief: Indicates that the PE associated with this Redistributor is in a low-power state. Software sets this bit to 1 when quiescing, and to 0 when waking.

fields.name: RES0_0
fields.brief: Reserved.

registers.name: GICR_PROPBASER
registers.title: Redistributor Properties Base Address Register
registers.brief: Specifies the base address and attributes of the LPI Configuration table. Valid only when LPI support is implemented.

fields.name: RES0_63_52
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: PA
fields.brief: Physical Address. Specifies bits[51:12] of the physical address of the LPI Configuration table.

fields.name: RES0_11
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Shareability
fields.brief: Shareability of the LPI Configuration table walk. Bits [10:9].

fields.name: OuterCache
fields.brief: Outer cacheability of the LPI Configuration table walk. Bits [8:6].

fields.name: InnerCache
fields.brief: Inner cacheability of the LPI Configuration table walk. Bits [5:3].

fields.name: IDbits
fields.brief: Number of interrupt identifier bits, minus one. Bits [2:0].

registers.name: GICR_PENDBASER
registers.title: Redistributor LPI Pending Table Base Address Register
registers.brief: Specifies the base address and attributes of the LPI Pending table. Valid only when LPI support is implemented.

fields.name: PTZ
fields.brief: Pending Table Zero. When set to 1, the ITS treats the LPI Pending table as all-zeros regardless of the actual contents.

fields.name: RES0_62_52
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: PA
fields.brief: Physical Address. Specifies bits[51:16] of the physical address of the LPI Pending table.

fields.name: RES0_15_12
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Shareability
fields.brief: Shareability attribute. Bits [11:10].

fields.name: InnerCache
fields.brief: Inner cacheability. Bits [9:7].

fields.name: OuterCache
fields.brief: Outer cacheability. Bits [6:4].

registers.name: GITS_CTLR
registers.title: ITS Control Register
registers.brief: Controls the operation of the ITS (Interrupt Translation Service).

fields.name: Quiesced
fields.brief: Indicates that the ITS is quiescent (not processing commands).

fields.name: RES0_30_8
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: ITS_NUM
fields.brief: ITS Number. Provides a unique identifier for this ITS.

fields.name: RES0_3_2
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: ImDe
fields.brief: Interrupt translation table de-assert. When set, the ITS de-asserts interrupts from tables in memory.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.brief: Enables the ITS. When set to 0 the ITS is quiesced after outstanding translations are complete.

registers.name: GITS_IIDR
registers.title: ITS Implementer Identification Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the implementer and revision of the ITS component.

fields.name: ProductID
fields.brief: Product identifier.

fields.name: RES0_23_20
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Variant
fields.brief: Implementation defined variant.

fields.name: Revision
fields.brief: Revision of the implementation.

fields.name: Implementer
fields.brief: JEP106 implementer code.

registers.name: GITS_TYPER
registers.title: ITS Type Register
registers.brief: Provides information about the features supported by the ITS.

fields.name: RES0_63_37
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: VMOVP
fields.brief: Indicates whether the ITS supports the VMOVP command.

fields.name: VSGI
fields.brief: Virtual SGI support. Indicates whether the ITS supports Virtual SGIs (GICv4.1).

fields.name: VMAPP
fields.brief: VMAPP command support.

fields.name: nID
fields.brief: Number of interrupt ID bits.

fields.name: HCC
fields.brief: Hardware Collection Count. Indicates the number of hardware collections.

fields.name: PTA
fields.brief: Physical Target Address. Indicates whether the ITS supports physical target addresses.

fields.name: RES0_18
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Devbits
fields.brief: The number of device ID bits implemented, minus one.

fields.name: ID_bits
fields.brief: The number of interrupt ID bits implemented, minus one.

fields.name: ITT_entry_size
fields.brief: The number of bytes per entry in the interrupt translation table.

fields.name: CCT
fields.brief: Collection Count Table. Indicates whether the ITS uses a Collection Table in memory.

fields.name: Physical
fields.brief: Physical LPIs. Indicates whether the ITS supports physical LPIs.

registers.name: GITS_CBASER
registers.title: ITS Command Queue Descriptor Register
registers.brief: Provides the base address, size and attributes of the ITS command queue.

fields.name: Valid
fields.brief: Valid. When set to 1, the contents of this register are valid.

fields.name: RES0_62
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: InnerCache
fields.brief: Inner cacheability of the command queue accesses.

fields.name: Shareability
fields.brief: Shareability of the command queue accesses.

fields.name: OuterCache
fields.brief: Outer cacheability of the command queue accesses.

fields.name: PA
fields.brief: Physical Address. Bits[51:12] of the physical address of the command queue.

fields.name: RES0_11_8
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Size
fields.brief: Size of the command queue. Specifies the number of 4KB pages minus one.

registers.name: GITS_CWRITER
registers.title: ITS Write Register
registers.brief: Provides the offset of the next entry to be written in the ITS command queue.

fields.name: RES0_63_21
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Retry
fields.brief: If 1, the previous write to GITS_CWRITER failed and the write must be retried.

fields.name: Offset
fields.brief: The write offset into the ITS command queue, in units of 32 bytes.

registers.name: GITS_CREADR
registers.title: ITS Read Register
registers.brief: Provides the offset of the next entry to be read from the ITS command queue. Read-only.

fields.name: RES0_63_20
fields.brief: Reserved.

fields.name: Stalled
fields.brief: Stalled. Set to 1 if the ITS has stalled processing commands.

fields.name: Offset
fields.brief: The read offset from the ITS command queue, in units of 32 bytes.
